name: jsonstat-validator-monorepo
description: Monorepo for the jsonstat-validator semantic validator (JSON-stat 2.0).

scripts.gen: npm run bundle && npm run gen -w @jsonstat-validator/ts
scripts.build: npm run build -w @jsonstat-validator/ts && npm run build -w jsonstat-validate
scripts.pack:cli: npm run build -w jsonstat-validate && npm pack -w jsonstat-validate --dry-run
